executives.name: Jack Fusco
executives.background: Mr. Fusco has served as President and Chief Executive Officer since May 2016. He is also a director of Cheniere. Prior to joining Cheniere, he served as CEO of Calpine Corporation from 2008 to 2014 and as Executive Chairman from 2014 to 2016.

executives.name: Zach Davis
executives.background: Mr. Davis has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since February 2022. He previously served as Senior Vice President and CFO from August 2020 to February 2022, and as Vice President, Strategy and Budget from 2016 to 2020.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Anatol Feygin
executives.background: Mr. Feygin has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer since September 2016. He joined Cheniere in 2014 as Senior Vice President, Strategy and Corporate Development.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer

executives.name: Corey Grindal
executives.background: Mr. Grindal has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2023. He previously served as Executive Vice President, Worldwide Trading from 2020 to 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

board_of_directors.name: Steven Farris
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Farris has served as Chairman of the Board since 2016. He was previously the Chairman and CEO of Apache Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Jack Fusco
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Cheniere Energy, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Vicky Bailey
board_of_directors.background: President of Anderson Stratton Enterprises, LLC. Former Assistant Secretary for the Office of Policy and International Affairs at the U.S. Department of Energy.

board_of_directors.name: Patricia Collawn
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of PNM Resources, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: David Foley
board_of_directors.background: Senior Managing Director in the Private Equity Group at Blackstone and Global Head of Blackstone Energy Partners.

board_of_directors.name: Andrew Langham
board_of_directors.background: General Counsel of Icahn Enterprises L.P.

board_of_directors.name: Courtney Mather
board_of_directors.background: Portfolio Manager at Icahn Capital LP.

board_of_directors.name: Donald Robillard, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Former Director, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Hunt Consolidated, Inc.
